title: Enums (and why to skip them)
description: Enums exist — but literal unions are usually better.

questions.explanation: enum Dir { Up, Down } → Up=0, Down=1.

options: Debuggable values instead of magic numbers

questions.explanation: No runtime cost, plays nicer with narrowing and JSON.

options: Inlined at build time — no runtime object
questions.explanation: But isolatedModules bans them; use `as const` object patterns instead.
